note: 05-29 window partial (21 runs). New infra anomaly; several prior anomalies resolved or could not be re-evaluated in-window.

anomalies.t: NEW: Both cache-memory-enabled workflows in the window (Chaos PR Bundle Fuzzer, Copilot PR Prompt Pattern Analysis) failed identically. setup_cache_memory_git.sh detects a cache hit, claims 'git repository found', then hits 'fatal: not in a git directory' (exit 128) because the restored cache has data files but no valid .git. Failure occurs at both the setup step and the commit step. Chaos agent never executed (turns=0). Single-script fix: validate .git after restore and re-init when the dir has files but is not a git repo.
